Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Actions Pursuant To Stipulation
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Harrison Nam, Esq. (415-765-6257) for Defendant/Moving party ALBERT JOSHUA, DAVID KIMMEL, STEVENSON STREET PARTNERS and STEVENSON PLAZA LLC.
No other Appearance.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS ALBERT JOSHUA, DAVID KIMMEL, STEVENSON STREET PARTNERS and STEVENSON PLAZA LLC's Motion To Consolidate Actions Pursuant To Stipulation is GRANTED. Actions are consolidated for purposes of discovery, pre-trial proceedings and trial. Action CGC-15-546392 shall be the lead case. Moving party prepare order. Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
